input.title: Table: Col1 width changes if there is a thought after the table
input.body: ## Steps to Reproduce ``` - a - =view - Table - =pin - true - b - c - d - e ``` ## Current Behavior The width of col1 is a bit wide: If `x` is added after `a` and the page is refreshed, the width changes: ## Expected Behavior The width of col1 should not change depending on whether or not there is a sibling after the table. The width is better in the second screenshot, when the sibling follows.
